listitem.para: * r = the first stage regression tlist result
* f = value of the reset F test

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes Ramsey (1969) RESET test for non linearity of power 2 to p (see Ramsay (1969) :"Tests for specification errors in classical linear least-squares regression analysis", Journal of the Royal Statistical Society, Series B, 2, 350-371). Results are given only in constant form and not printed.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
